title: Leptoplax emarginata
taxonomy: Leptoplax emarginata is classified as a species of sea snail, specifically within the family Leptoplacidae. This family is part of the larger phylum Mollusca, which includes a wide range of marine and freshwater invertebrates. The order Patellogastropoda, to which Leptoplax emarginata belongs, is a group of marine snails characterized by their radula and shell morphology. Leptoplax emarginata is also classified as a genus of marine snails, which is further divided into various species. The classification of Leptoplax emarginata provides valuable information about its evolutionary history and relationships with other marine snail species.
